GenAiFunction.description:
Search the public web for information that does not live in this Salesforce org. Uses the Tavily API to turn a natural-language query into a single natural-language answer with citations.
Use when: - The user asks about general knowledge, news, documentation, or something external (e.g. "what is PlantUML", "latest Salesforce release notes", company research). - A SOQL, Data Cloud, or Metadata/Tooling API call failed with an unclear error and you need to look up the cause or the correct API/object to use. - The user explicitly says "search the web" or names an external site/company.
NOT for: - Org records or metadata — use QueryRecordsWithSoql, ExploreOrgSchema, CallMetadataApi, or CallToolingApi. - Internal company documents or policies uploaded to the Data Library — use SearchDataLibrary. - Data Cloud data — use QueryDataCloud.
